rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 7/10 with identical strengths and concerns, differing only in trivial rewording ('Experience with' vs 'Experience in', 'Proven ability to work on' vs 'Proven track record of contributing to'). No score change, no new concerns, and no shifted reasoning tied to the swapped employer names (re:cinq→Acme, Optilyz→Pinepoint, GISCollective→Northwind). These differences are within ordinary run-to-run noise.
